response.global_analysis:
1. Tracked both speaking segments and song segments correctly. The trailer song was identified as 'Happiness' (ハピネス) rather than 'Farewell', so the lyrics were manually transcribed and translated accordingly.
2. Timed speech bursts carefully, paying attention to specific merchandise titles, illustrator names (Nobusawa Osamu, Nyatora), and album titles.
3. Addressed sudden transitions and fast pacing in speech/lyrics to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 本当にね、内容盛りだくさんで...
subtitles.english: There really was so much content.

subtitles.original: そうだ、このね、新しい小悪魔衣装のこと、あんまり話せなかったので、
subtitles.english: That's right! I couldn't talk much about this new little devil outfit,

subtitles.original: この後、メン限でゆっくり見てもらえたらと思います。
subtitles.english: so I hope you can take a closer look during the members-only stream after this.

subtitles.original: 実は、色んなアクセサリーや差分があります。ということで...
subtitles.english: Actually, it has various accessories and variations. So,

subtitles.original: ぜひメン限もよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: please look forward to the members-only stream too!

subtitles.original: そして、皆様！
subtitles.english: And everyone!

subtitles.original: 最後にAZKiからみんなに、
subtitles.english: lastly, from AZKi to all of you,

subtitles.original: 嬉しいお知らせです！
subtitles.english: there is some exciting news!

subtitles.original: こちらをどうぞ！
subtitles.english: Please take a look!

subtitles.original: 傷ついた感情も連れていくから
subtitles.english: Because I will carry even my hurt feelings with me

subtitles.original: そっと響くファンファーレが新しい未来を感じてる
subtitles.english: The softly echoing fanfare is sensing a new future

subtitles.original: 誇らしく歌って進むしかないでしょう
subtitles.english: We have no choice but to sing proudly and move forward,

subtitles.original: どこまでも
subtitles.english: no matter how far.

subtitles.original: 届けこの祈りよ
subtitles.english: Reach, this prayer of mine,

subtitles.original: 光となれ
subtitles.english: and become the light!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: More, more,

subtitles.original: 少しずつでもいい
subtitles.english: even if it's little by little,

subtitles.original: 優しいという答えを
subtitles.english: give me the answer of kindness...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: more,

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: more,

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: more...

subtitles.original: お待たせしました！
subtitles.english: Thank you for waiting!

subtitles.original: AZKiソロライブ2025「Departure」Blu-ray発売決定！
subtitles.english: AZKi Solo Live 2025 "Departure" Blu-ray release confirmed!

subtitles.original: 開拓者のみんなと紡いだあのステージが何度でも見返せます！
subtitles.english: You can rewatch that stage we created together with all the Pioneers as many times as you want!

subtitles.original: 本日から受注受付が開始です！
subtitles.english: Orders are open starting today!

subtitles.original: 続いて、告知2つ目！
subtitles.english: Next, the second announcement!

subtitles.original: AZKiの歴史を彩るアルバム2作品の再販が、本日7月1日より全国流通スタート！
subtitles.english: The re-release of the two albums that color AZKi's history starts national distribution today, July 1st!

subtitles.original: 対象タイトルは、『Without U』と『Re:Creating world』です！
subtitles.english: The eligible titles are 'Without U' and 'Re:Creating world'!

subtitles.original: 最後、告知3つ目！
subtitles.english: Lastly, the third announcement!

subtitles.original: AZKi誕生日記念2026グッズ情報！
subtitles.english: AZKi Birthday Celebration 2026 merchandise info!

subtitles.original: 今回は、お披露目された小悪魔衣装にちなんだグッズが盛りだくさんです！
subtitles.english: This time, we have plenty of merchandise themed around the newly revealed little devil outfit!

subtitles.original: イラストは、信澤収先生に描いていただきました！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: The illustrations were drawn by Nobusawa Osamu-sensei! Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: それでは詳細を見ていきましょう！
subtitles.english: Now, let's take a look at the details!

subtitles.original: まずは、こちら！
subtitles.english: First, here is this!

subtitles.original: 2層アクリルパネル！
subtitles.english: 2-Layer Acrylic Panel!

subtitles.original: 小悪魔衣装のキービジュアルをアクリルパネルにしました！
subtitles.english: The key visual of the little devil outfit is now an acrylic panel!

subtitles.original: 2層になっているので、立体的に見えます。
subtitles.english: Since it's double-layered, it looks three-dimensional.

subtitles.original: ステンドグラスの神秘的な美しさと小悪魔衣装が見せるギャップを楽しんでください！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy the gap between the mysterious beauty of the stained glass and the little devil outfit!

subtitles.original: 続いては、こちら！
subtitles.english: Next up is this!

subtitles.original: ランダムラバーキーホルダー！
subtitles.english: Random Rubber Keychain!

subtitles.original: この後のメン限でも詳しく見せるんですけど、...
subtitles.english: I'll show you more details in the members-only stream later, but

subtitles.original: 今回の新衣装、実はバリエーションがいっぱいあるので、ラバーキーホルダーにしてもらいました！...
subtitles.english: this new outfit actually has many variations, so we made them into rubber keychains!

subtitles.original: 君のお気に入りはどのAZKiかな？
subtitles.english: Which AZKi is your favorite?

subtitles.original: イラストは、にゃとら先生に描いていただきました！
subtitles.english: The illustrations were drawn by Nyatora-sensei!

subtitles.original: 続いては、こちら！
subtitles.english: Next up is this!

subtitles.original: ぬいぐるみキーホルダー！
subtitles.english: Plushie Keychain!

subtitles.original: こちらも小悪魔衣装バージョンとなってます。
subtitles.english: This is also the little devil outfit version.

subtitles.original: 使い魔みたいな茶目っ気のある表情になっているので、ぜひ相棒として連れ歩いてください！
subtitles.english: It has a playful expression like a familiar, so please take it with you as your partner!

subtitles.original: 続いては、こちら！
subtitles.english: Next up is this!

subtitles.original: おそろいブレスレット！
subtitles.english: Matching Bracelet!

subtitles.original: 小悪魔衣装をモチーフにしたデザインのブレスレットです。
subtitles.english: This is a bracelet designed with the little devil outfit as a motif.

subtitles.original: 日常の中でさりげなく「推し」を身にまとえるのはもちろん、
subtitles.english: Of course you can casually wear your favorite "oshi" in your daily life,

subtitles.original: 普段アクセサリーをつけない方には、新衣装の再現コレクションとしてもおすすめのグッズです。
subtitles.english: and for those who don't usually wear accessories, it is also recommended as a replica collection of the new outfit.

subtitles.original: 続いては、こちら！
subtitles.english: Next up is this!

subtitles.original: ASMRボイス！
subtitles.english: ASMR Voice!

subtitles.original: ボイスタイトルは『小悪魔チャーミング』。
subtitles.english: The voice title is "Little Devil Charming".

subtitles.original: AZKiが小悪魔っぽく魔法をかけちゃう？そんな「もしも」のお話のASMRボイスです。...
subtitles.english: AZKi casts a spell like a little devil? It's an ASMR voice about such a "what-if" story.

subtitles.original: そして、フルセット購入特典もございます！
subtitles.english: And there is also a full-set purchase bonus!

subtitles.original: 信澤収先生イラストのAZKiのタロット風カードと、
subtitles.english: A tarot-style card of AZKi illustrated by Nobusawa Osamu-sensei,

subtitles.original: 特典ASMRボイスです！
subtitles.english: and a bonus ASMR voice!

subtitles.original: 数量限定バージョンは、直筆サイン＆箔押し複製メッセージ入りです！
subtitles.english: The limited edition version includes a hand-signed autograph and a foil-stamped printed message!

subtitles.original: 通常バージョンは、箔押し複製サイン＆メッセージ入りです！
subtitles.english: The regular version includes a foil-stamped printed autograph and message!

subtitles.original: ということで、以上、嬉しいお知らせでした！
subtitles.english: So, that's all for the exciting news!

subtitles.original: この後はメン限でアンコールライブ！...
subtitles.english: After this, we have the encore live in the members-only stream!

subtitles.original: まだメン限に入っていない方も、まだ間に合うので、ぜひ入ってみてください！...
subtitles.english: If you haven't joined membership yet, you're still in time, so please join us!

subtitles.original: 実は、今回の新衣装、...
subtitles.english: Actually, for this new outfit,

subtitles.original: みんなにまだ見せていない、あんな姿やこんな姿があるの、...
subtitles.english: there are other styles and looks that I haven't shown everyone yet,

subtitles.original: 見に来てくれたら嬉しいです！...
subtitles.english: so I'd be happy if you came to see them!

subtitles.original: 誕生日、たくさんお祝いしてくれて、ありがとう！...
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for celebrating my birthday!

subtitles.original: ライブも見てくれて、ありがとう！...
subtitles.english: Thank you for watching the live stream too!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、この後、メン限で会おうね！...
subtitles.english: Well then, see you in the members-only stream after this!

subtitles.original: バイバーイ！...
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!
